prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

you need to do ALL of these, each one gets its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

the copy should be compelling, on-brand, and like actually production ready

use all your tools to get this done. do everything, don't skip anything. i want to see every single file written. make sure it's thorough and complete

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adapts to your day.

Your workday isn’t static, and your light shouldn’t be either. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and the ambient light in your room—so you’re always in the best light to focus, meet, and unwind.

With a warm, modern design and an “it just works” experience, Lumina takes care of the tiny adjustments you shouldn’t have to think about. Fewer headaches, less eye strain, and a workspace that feels instantly calmer.

At $149, Lumina delivers premium smart lighting without the premium hassle. Plug it in, connect once, and let your light do the rest.

Email 1 — Launch Announcement
Subject: Meet Lumina: the desk lamp that adapts to your workday

Hi there,

Your calendar changes. The sun shifts. Your light should keep up.

Introducing Lumina, a smart desk lamp built for remote workers. It automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your scheduled events, and the ambient light in your room. That means better focus in the morning, calmer light for late-day calls, and zero manual fiddling.

Lumina is designed to feel effortless. Plug it in, connect once, and let it set the perfect light for every moment.

✅ Smart, adaptive lighting
✅ Reduces eye strain and fatigue
✅ Modern design that fits any setup

Available now for $149.

[Shop Lumina]

— The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Benefits & Social Proof
Subject: Less eye strain. More focus. Smarter light.

Hi there,

If you’ve ever ended a workday with tired eyes or a headache, your lighting might be the culprit. Lumina solves that by adjusting to your needs—automatically.

Here’s what Lumina does for you:
• Bright, cool light for focused work in the morning
• Softer, warmer light as the day winds down
• Adaptive changes during meetings so you always look and feel your best
• Real-time adjustments to your room’s ambient lighting

Remote workers tell us it feels like their desk finally “gets it.” One less thing to manage, one more way to feel good at work.

Lumina is $149 and built to make every workday easier.

[See how Lumina works]

— The Lumina Team


Email 3 — Final Call / Offer
Subject: Last call to upgrade your workday lighting

Hi there,

This is your reminder that better light means better workdays. Lumina adapts to your schedule, your space, and your rhythm—so you can focus on what matters.

At $149, it’s the smartest, simplest upgrade you can make to your desk setup.

Ready to work in your best light?

[Get Lumina today]

— The Lumina Team

Twitter/X (2 posts)
1) Your calendar changes. The sun shifts. Your light should keep up. 
Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adapts to time of day, meetings, and room light. $149. 
#remotework #productivity #smartlighting

2) Stop tweaking your desk lamp all day. Lumina automatically sets the right brightness + color temp so you can focus. 
Light that just works. $149. 
#workfromhome #desksetup

Instagram (2 posts)
1) A desk lamp that thinks for you ✨
Lumina adjusts to your schedule, your space, and the time of day—so you’re always in your best light.
$149 • Designed for remote work
#desksetup #wfh #smarthome

2) Morning focus. Afternoon meetings. Evening wind-down.
Lumina shifts the light so you don’t have to.
Tap to see how it works. 💡
#productivity #workfromhome #lighting

LinkedIn (2 posts)
1) Introducing Lumina, a smart desk lamp built for the realities of remote work. It adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—automatically. Better focus, less eye strain, zero manual adjustments. Now available for $149.

2) Your lighting impacts how you work and feel. Lumina makes it effortless with adaptive brightness and color temperature throughout the day. Designed for modern teams and home offices. Launching now for $149.

HERO
Headline: Lumina adapts to your day—so you can focus.
Subhead: A smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room light.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See it in action

FEATURES
1) Adaptive lighting that just works
Lumina senses the time of day, your schedule, and your room’s light to set the perfect balance—cooler for focus, warmer for wind-down.

2) Calendar-aware for meetings
Have a call? Lumina shifts to flattering, comfortable light so you look and feel your best on camera.

3) Real-time ambient adjustments
Clouds roll in? Room gets dim? Lumina responds instantly so your workspace stays consistent.

4) Designed for modern workspaces
Warm, minimal design with a soft-glow diffusion that looks great on any desk.

5) One-time setup, daily ease
Connect once and forget it. Lumina handles the rest.

TESTIMONIALS (Placeholder)
“[Customer quote about less eye strain and better focus.]” — Name, Role
“[Customer quote about effortless lighting changes.]” — Name, Company
“[Customer quote about improved video calls.]” — Name, Role

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to change the light?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar events, and a built-in ambient light sensor to adjust brightness and color temperature automatically.

2) Do I need a smart home hub?
No. Lumina connects directly to Wi‑Fi for setup and updates.

3) Can I override the settings?
Yes. You can manually adjust brightness and color temperature anytime.

4) Will it work without my calendar connected?
Yes. Lumina still adapts to time of day and ambient light even without calendar access.

5) Is Lumina good for video calls?
Absolutely. It provides balanced, flattering light that reduces harsh shadows and eye strain.

CTA
Ready to work in your best light?
Get Lumina for $149
Free shipping • 30-day returns

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

Dateline: SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year]

San Francisco-based Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting—delivering a more comfortable, productive workspace without manual tweaks.

“Remote work has changed how we spend our days at a desk, but lighting hasn’t kept up,” said [Founder Name], CEO of Lumina. “Lumina is built to fit the way people actually work. It adapts in real time so you can stay focused, reduce eye strain, and feel better throughout the day.”

Priced at $149, Lumina offers a premium smart lighting experience without the complexity. Users connect once, and the lamp automatically optimizes light for morning focus, midday meetings, and evening wind-down. Its minimal, warm design complements modern home offices while providing soft, balanced illumination.

Lumina is available now at [Website URL] with shipping to the U.S. and select international markets.

For product images, interviews, or review requests, contact:
[Press Contact Name]
[Email Address]
[Phone Number]

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting designed for how people actually work. Built for modern remote teams and home offices, Lumina products deliver adaptive, effortless light that reduces eye strain and boosts focus. Learn more at [Website URL].

steps.text:
All requested files have been created:

- tagline.txt
- hero-copy.txt
- email-sequence.txt
- social-posts.txt
- landing-page.txt
- press-release.txt

If you want any edits or additional variants, tell me which file(s) and I’ll revise.
